outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low volatility expected; positive total GEX promotes strike pinning and mean-reversion.
outlook.summary: The market is characterized by a highly positive aggregate GEX, indicating dealer long gamma and suppressed volatility. Spot is hovering just above the 0DTE Gamma Flip at 715.1, which aligns with massive Call open interest, creating a powerful magnetic attraction. Upside is strictly capped by a multi-expiry Call Wall at 720, while downside structural supports are entrenched at 710 and 700. Bearish volatility skew persists, but the intense intraday Call volume suggests short-term pinning at the upper bounds of the range.

levels.motivazione: 0DTE Gamma Flip (715.1) aligns perfectly with massive Call OI and extreme volume across all three expirations. Acts as the primary intraday equilibrium and magnetic pinning level.
Major multi-expiry Call resistance with significant OI concentration and high volume. Positive GEX ensures dealers will aggressively hedge and suppress upward movement near this zone.
Significant Put support and Call friction across all expirations. Massive 0DTE put volume (187k) indicates strong defensive positioning and dealer hedging support.
Monumental Put OI across 0DTE, WEEKLY, and MONTHLY. Coincides with 0DTE Max Pain (699.0), serving as the ultimate structural floor and target for mean reversion.
WEEKLY Gamma Flip (704.44) aligns with heavy Put OI across multiple expirations. A critical confluence support level marking the shift in weekly dealer gamma exposure.
Significant Call OI across all three expirations acting as a secondary ceiling and upper bound for the positive GEX pinning range.
